feed.title: itrain.ing Blog
feed.subtitle: Training programming, the builder, and shareable programs

entry.title: Programming With %1RM and RPE on the Same Row
entry.summary: Use estimated maxes to fill load from percentages, or log RPE when percentages drift. Both fit in one row.

entry.title: Getting Started With the Program Builder
entry.summary: A quick walkthrough of mesocycles, weeks, days, and rows so you can ship your first shareable training plan.

entry.title: How Sharing Works on itrain.ing
entry.summary: Your whole program lives in one open link. Send it to athletes, post it for lifters to learn from, and update it as you edit.
